description: INEC press releases and key announcements 2023–2026. Stub — INEC domains unreachable.

data.title: 2027 Presidential and National Assembly election date
data.detail: Presidential and NASS elections scheduled 2027-01-16; gubernatorial and state assembly 2027-02-06

gaps.note: INEC domains (inecnigeria.org, inec.gov.ng) unreachable. All INEC announcements must be fetched from those sites or via media archives.
